title: Compact Info
description: Minimalistic F3 information, like OptiFine's quick info.
body:
# If anyone’s interested, feel free to fork this mod. I’m stopping support for it for now.

This mod adds a compact overlay with useful optional indicators.

### All indicators:
(All optional)
- Coordinates
- Direction
- Yaw
- Pitch
- Surface Y
- Chunk info
- Hostiles
- Nether conversion
- Biome
- Days
- FPS
- RAM

### Other settings
- Horizontal & Vertical Pos
- Scale
- Aligment: Top Left, Top Center, Top Right, Bottom Left, Bottom Center, Bottom Right, Automatic
- Opacity 

The config is configurable via **commands** and **GUI** (cloth-config & modmenu - integrated)

### Supported languages:
🇬🇧 🇺🇦 🇵🇱 🇩🇪 🇫🇷 🇪🇸 🇨🇳
